strengths: Extensive fullstack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and databases (MongoDB, PostgreSQL)
Strong background in scalable systems, microservices, and high-performance architectures
Proven track record of building and maintaining platforms with Kubernetes, AWS, and CI/CD pipelines
concerns: Overqualified for a junior/mid-level role with 10+ years of senior-level experience
Limited recent direct experience with PostgreSQL and relational databases in listed projects
No explicit mention of LLM/API integration or machine learning exposure in the resume
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep fullstack expertise and pragmatic problem-solving skills, aligning well with the technical stack requirements. However, his 10+ years of senior-level experience and focus on AI-agent infrastructure may overshoot the entry-level role's expectations. His relational database exposure appears limited compared to the PostgreSQL requirement, though his broader database experience is extensive.
